ast.name: warn
ast.source: Seems the loaded translations were in flat JSON format instead of nested. Either set keySeparator: false on init or make sure your translations are published in nested format.
ast.target: 加载的翻译似乎是扁平JSON格式而非嵌套格式。请在初始化时设置keySeparator: false，或确保您的翻译以嵌套格式发布。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This means something IS WRONG in your setup. You access the t function before i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage was done. Wait for the callback or Promise to resolve before accessing it!!!
ast.target: 这意味着您的设置中存在错误。您在i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage完成之前就访问了t函数。请等待回调或Promise解析后再访问它！！！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: nesting options string contains interpolated variables with escapeValue: false — if any of those values are attacker-controlled they can inject additional nesting options (e.g. redirect lng/ns). Sanitise untrusted input before passing it to t(), or keep escapeValue: true.
ast.target: 嵌套选项字符串包含转义值为false的插值变量——如果这些值中的任何一个由攻击者控制，他们可以注入额外的嵌套选项（例如重定向lng/ns）。在将不受信任的输入传递给t()之前进行清理，或保持escapeValue: true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create groups to categorize your activities. The engine will use these rules to generate personalized insights.
ast.target: 创建群组以对您的活动进行分类。引擎将使用这些规则来生成个性化洞察。

ast.name: description
ast.source: You are exploring sample ChronoAnalyser data. Configure your own insight groups to switch permanently to live data.
ast.target: 您正在浏览示例 ChronoAnalyser 数据。配置您自己的洞察群组以永久切换到实时数据。

ast.name: description
ast.source: General behavior, reminders, and recent updates.
ast.target: 常规行为、提醒和最近更新。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Customize calendar appearance, time formats, and visibility.
ast.target: 自定义日历外观、时间格式和可见性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Manage calendar sources and provider-specific configuration.
ast.target: 管理日历源和特定于提供商的配置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Organize views with workspaces and event categorization.
ast.target: 使用工作区和事件分类来组织视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Connect external services like Google, Outlook, and ActivityWatch.
ast.target: 连接外部服务，如 Google、Outlook 和 ActivityWatch。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose the initial view range on desktop devices.
ast.target: 选择桌面设备上的初始视图范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose the initial view range on mobile devices.
ast.target: 选择移动设备上的初始视图范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose the timezone for displaying events. Defaults to your system timezone. Changing this will reload the calendar.
ast.target: 选择用于显示事件的时区。默认为您的系统时区。更改此设置将重新加载日历。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Switch off to open day view on click instead.
ast.target: 关闭以改为在点击时打开日视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose the folder path where event linked notes will be created.
ast.target: 选择将创建事件关联笔记的文件夹路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Define the template used for creating new linked notes. Supports: {{title}}, {{description}}, {{date}}, {{timeString}}, {{location}}, {{calendarName}}, {{url}}
ast.target: 定义用于创建新关联笔记的模板。支持：{{title}}、{{description}}、{{date}}、{{timeString}}、{{location}}、{{calendarName}}、{{url}}

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically add a reminder to new events.
ast.target: 自动为新事件添加提醒。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 事件前提醒的分钟数（默认：10）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose what day of the week to start.
ast.target: 选择一周从哪一天开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display the time in a 24-hour format.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Highlight your working hours in time-grid views to distinguish work time from personal time.
ast.target: 在时间网格视图中突出显示您的工作时间，以区分工作时间和个人时间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select which days of the week are business days.
ast.target: 选择一周中的哪些天是工作日。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When your working day begins (format: HH:mm)
ast.target: 您的工作日开始时间（格式：HH:mm）

ast.name: description
ast.source: When your working day ends (format: HH:mm)
ast.target: 您的工作日结束时间（格式：HH:mm）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Set the earliest time visible in time grid views (format: HH:mm)
ast.target: 设置时间网格视图中可见的最早时间（格式：HH:mm）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Set the latest time visible in time grid views (format: HH:mm)
ast.target: 设置时间网格视图中可见的最晚时间（格式：HH:mm）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle the all-day row at the top of week and day time-grid views.
ast.target: 切换周和日时间网格视图顶部的全天行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose how day labels are displayed in week and day views.
ast.target: 选择在周视图和日视图中如何显示日期标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether to display weekend days (Saturday and Sunday) in the calendar
ast.target: 是否在日历中显示周末（星期六和星期日）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select days of the week to hide from the calendar
ast.target: 选择要从日历中隐藏的星期几

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit the number of events shown per day in month view
ast.target: 限制月视图中每天显示的事件数量

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow events to be displayed as background elements for things like vacations, focus time, or class schedules.
ast.target: 允许事件显示为背景元素，用于假期、专注时间或课程表等。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display the title of the currently running event in the Obsidian status bar.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 状态栏中显示当前正在运行的事件的标题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read-only local milestones that track successful event activity across calendars.
ast.target: 只读的本地里程碑，用于跟踪跨日历的成功事件活动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Milestones are anonymous, local, and read-only. They unlock as successful actions are completed.
ast.target: 里程碑是匿名的、本地的且只读的。当成功完成操作时，它们会解锁。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 成功在日历之间移动 500 个事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create 500 events across ICS, CalDAV, and Google providers.
ast.target: 通过 ICS、CalDAV 和 Google 提供商创建 500 个事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create 1,000 events through Tasks + TaskNotes integrations.
ast.target: 通过 Tasks + TaskNotes 集成创建 1,000 个事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reach 500 created events in 3 different provider types.
ast.target: 在 3 种不同的提供商类型中达到 500 个已创建事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reach both 500 created and 500 deleted events.
ast.target: 同时达到 500 个已创建事件和 500 个已删除事件。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 达到 10,000 次总成功操作（创建/删除/更新/移动）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Perform calendar actions on 20 consecutive days.
ast.target: 在连续 20 天内执行日历操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maintain at least 3 months between first and latest recorded action.
ast.target: 在首次和最近记录的操作之间保持至少 3 个月。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 达到 100,000 次总成功操作。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 使用 NLP 输入创建 1,000 个事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create events in 3 or more different time zones.
ast.target: 在 3 个或更多不同的时区创建事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maintain 5 or more active remote calendars (Google/ICS/CalDAV).
ast.target: 维护 5 个或更多活动的远程日历（Google/ICS/CalDAV）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 创建 30 个重复事件系列。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 在不同日历之间移动 200 个事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Have a perfect week with at least 3 created events every day Monday-Sunday.
ast.target: 拥有一个完美的一周，从周一到周日每天至少创建 3 个事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maintain over 10,000 non-deleted events across local calendars.
ast.target: 在本地日历中维护超过 10,000 个未删除的事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Configure settings for creating local Obsidian notes linked to remote calendar events.
ast.target: 配置用于创建链接到远程日历事件的本地 Obsidian 笔记的设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Heading to store events under in the daily note.
ast.target: 在日记中存储事件的标题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose how timed events are written in daily notes.
ast.target: 选择如何在日记中写入定时事件。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 粘贴您的日历集合 URL（例如 https://calendar.zoho.in/caldav/<id>/events/）

ast.name: description
ast.source: This provider automatically reads your existing Obsidian Tasks plugin settings. All tasks with due dates will be displayed on the calendar as read-only events.
ast.target: 此提供商会自动读取您现有的 Obsidian Tasks 插件设置。所有带有截止日期的任务都将作为只读事件显示在日历上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Event Edits happen directly in the Tasks Model and not the Full Calendar Edit Modal.
ast.target: 事件编辑直接在 Tasks 模型中进行，而不是在完整日历编辑模态框中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This provider reads TaskNotes tasks directly from your vault and maps scheduled tasks to calendar events.
ast.target: 此提供商直接从您的保险库读取 TaskNotes 任务，并将计划的任务映射到日历事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose where Full Calendar forwards TaskNotes-targeted NLP requests.
ast.target: 选择完整日历将 TaskNotes 目标的 NLP 请求转发到何处。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Event edits open the TaskNotes editor. Drag-and-drop updates scheduled date and duration without showing a modal.
ast.target: 事件编辑会打开 TaskNotes 编辑器。拖放会更新计划日期和持续时间，而不会显示模态框。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable category-based coloring and unlock timeline views. This will modify event note titles and allow timeline visualization by category.
ast.target: 启用基于类别的着色并解锁时间线视图。这将修改事件笔记标题，并允许按类别进行时间线可视化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create and manage calendar workspaces. Each workspace can have its own view settings, visible calendars, and filters.
ast.target: 创建和管理日历工作区。每个工作区可以有自己的视图设置、可见日历和过滤器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: To begin, add a calendar source using the "+" button in the "Manage calendars" section.
ast.target: 首先，请使用“管理日历”部分中的“+”按钮添加日历源。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Periodically pull data from your local ActivityWatch instance.
ast.target: 定期从您的本地 ActivityWatch 实例拉取数据。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Configure how Full Calendar schedules tasks from the Tasks backlog.
ast.target: 配置完整日历如何从任务待办事项列表中安排任务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose which Tasks date marker the backlog tracks. The backlog shows tasks missing this selected date marker.
ast.target: 选择待办事项列表跟踪哪个 Tasks 日期标记。待办事项列表显示缺少所选日期标记的任务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose which Tasks date marker Full Calendar uses to display Tasks events. There is no fallback to other date markers. Restart Obsidian or reload the plugin for this change to fully take effect.
ast.target: 选择完整日历用于显示 Tasks 事件的 Tasks 日期标记。没有回退到其他日期标记。重新启动 Obsidian 或重新加载插件以使此更改完全生效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open the Obsidian Tasks edit modal immediately after dragging a task from the backlog onto the calendar.
ast.target: 将任务从待办事项列表拖到日历上后，立即打开 Obsidian Tasks 编辑模态框。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Apply the Obsidian Tasks global query filters to the backlog view.
ast.target: 将 Obsidian Tasks 全局查询过滤器应用于待办事项列表视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose how Full Calendar writes time into Tasks lines.
ast.target: 选择完整日历如何将时间写入 Tasks 行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select which TaskNotes calendar source to configure.
ast.target: 选择要配置的 TaskNotes 日历源。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose whether Full Calendar should open TaskNotes search NLP or create NLP.
ast.target: 选择完整日历应打开 TaskNotes 搜索 NLP 还是创建 NLP。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sync your upcoming calendar events with the persistent FCR Reminder background companion daemon to receive native system-level toast notifications even when Obsidian is completely closed.
ast.target: 将您即将到来的日历事件与持久的 FCR Reminder 后台伴侣守护进程同步，以便在 Obsidian 完全关闭时也能收到原生系统级的 Toast 通知。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Synchronize upcoming event alarms to the background companion daemon.
ast.target: 将即将到来的事件警报同步到后台伴侣守护进程。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The loopback address of the FCR Reminder daemon.
ast.target: FCR Reminder 守护进程的回环地址。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This is a recurring event. What would you like to do with all of its future "override" instances (i.e., events that you have dragged or modified)?
ast.target: 这是一个重复事件。您想如何处理其所有未来的“覆盖”实例（即您已拖动或修改的事件）？

ast.name: description
ast.source: Delete only the instance on {{date}}. This will skip this date in the recurrence.
ast.target: 仅删除 {{date}} 上的实例。这将跳过重复中的这个日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turn all overriden events (if any) into standalone, single events. They will no longer be linked to this recurring series.
ast.target: 将所有覆盖的事件（如果有）转换为独立的单个事件。它们将不再链接到此重复系列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Delete all future override events associated with this recurring series. This cannot be undone.
ast.target: 删除与此重复系列关联的所有未来覆盖事件。此操作无法撤销。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A unique name for this workspace

ast.name: description
ast.source: Date to jump to when activating workspace (e.g., "today", "2024-01-01")
ast.target: 激活工作区时跳转到的日期（例如，“今天”、“2024-01-01”）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select which calendars to show (leave empty to show all)
ast.target: 选择要显示的日历（留空则显示全部）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select categories to include/exclude (leave empty to show all)
ast.target: 选择要包含/排除的类别（留空则显示全部）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable custom business hours for this workspace
ast.target: 为此工作区启用自定义工作时间

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show business hours highlighting in this workspace
ast.target: 在此工作区中显示工作时间高亮

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select which days of the week are business days
ast.target: 选择一周中的哪些天为工作日

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default state for timeline category groups
ast.target: 时间线类别组的默认状态

ast.name: description
ast.source: Override the earliest time visible in time grid views (format: HH:mm)
ast.target: 覆盖时间网格视图中可见的最早时间（格式：HH:mm）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Override the latest time visible in time grid views (format: HH:mm)
ast.target: 覆盖时间网格视图中可见的最晚时间（格式：HH:mm）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Override whether to show weekends in the calendar
ast.target: 覆盖是否在日历中显示周末

ast.name: description
ast.source: Override which days to hide from the calendar
ast.target: 覆盖要从日历中隐藏的日期

ast.name: description
ast.source: Override the maximum number of events to show per day in month view
ast.target: 覆盖月视图中每天显示的最大事件数

ast.name: description
ast.source: How would you like to automatically categorize existing events in your local calendars? Note that this is a one time operation that will modify your event notes to match the required formatting.
ast.target: 您希望如何自动分类本地日历中的现有事件？请注意，这是一次性操作，将修改您的事件备注以匹配所需的格式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use parent folder names as the category for UN-categorized events. Events that already look like 'Category - Title' will be skipped.
ast.target: 使用父文件夹名称作为未分类事件的类别。已看起来像“类别 - 标题”的事件将被跳过。

ast.name: description
ast.source: PREPENDS the parent folder name to ALL event titles, even if they already have a category. Warning: This creates nested categories.
ast.target: 将父文件夹名称添加到所有事件标题的前面，即使它们已有类别。警告：这会创建嵌套类别。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Prepends a category you provide to ALL event titles. If a category already exists, the new one will be added in front (e.g., New - Old - Title).
ast.target: 将您提供的类别添加到所有事件标题的前面。如果类别已存在，新类别将添加在前面（例如，新 - 旧 - 标题）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use your own OAuth Client ID and Secret instead of the default. Plugin currently stands verified by Google, but you may still use this option.
ast.target: 使用您自己的 OAuth 客户端 ID 和密钥，而不是默认值。插件目前已被 Google 验证，但您仍可使用此选项。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 您的 Google OAuth 2.0 客户端 ID

ast.name: description
ast.target: 您的 Google OAuth 2.0 客户端密钥

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose which calendars you would like to add to Obsidian.
ast.target: 选择您希望添加到 Obsidian 的日历。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use your own Microsoft Client ID and proxy URL instead of the built-in defaults.
ast.target: 使用您自己的 Microsoft 客户端 ID 和代理 URL，而不是内置默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: OAuth app Client ID used for Microsoft login.
ast.target: 用于 Microsoft 登录的 OAuth 应用客户端 ID。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Base URL for your Microsoft token proxy (for example: https://your-app.vercel.app).
ast.target: 您的 Microsoft 令牌代理的基础 URL（例如：https://your-app.vercel.app）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose which Outlook calendars you would like to add to Obsidian.
ast.target: 选择您希望添加到 Obsidian 的 Outlook 日历。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Added support for [Obsidian Tasks](https://obsidian-full-calendar-remastered.github.io/plugin-full-calendar/user/calendars/tasks-plugin-integration/#supported-global-query-syntax) global query in backlog, enabling advanced filtering (tags, folders, priority, regex) via new setting.
ast.target: 为待办事项添加了 [Obsidian Tasks](https://obsidian-full-calendar-remastered.github.io/plugin-full-calendar/user/calendars/tasks-plugin-integration/#supported-global-query-syntax) 全局查询支持，通过新设置启用高级过滤（标签、文件夹、优先级、正则表达式）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Extended [CalDAV](https://obsidian-full-calendar-remastered.github.io/plugin-full-calendar/user/calendars/caldav/) to support tasks (VTODO) with improved fetching and consistency.
ast.target: 扩展了 [CalDAV](https://obsidian-full-calendar-remastered.github.io/plugin-full-calendar/user/calendars/caldav/) 以支持任务 (VTODO)，并改进了获取和一致性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Improved [timezone](https://obsidian-full-calendar-remastered.github.io/plugin-full-calendar/architecture/system/features/timezone-architecture/) accuracy for events with correct TZID handling and consistent UTC/local serialization.
ast.target: 改进了[时区](https://obsidian-full-calendar-remastered.github.io/plugin-full-calendar/architecture/system/features/timezone-architecture/)准确性，通过正确的 TZID 处理和一致的 UTC/本地序列化来处理事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optimized calendar refresh behavior to avoid full reloads, improving performance and visual stability during updates.
ast.target: 优化了日历刷新行为以避免完全重新加载，提高了更新期间的性能和视觉稳定性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fixed provider settings state inconsistencies affecting calendar configuration and updates.
ast.target: 修复了影响日历配置和更新的提供程序设置状态不一致问题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Resolved issue where reminder metadata was incorrectly stored as object strings.
ast.target: 解决了提醒元数据被错误存储为对象字符串的问题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fixed issues where [calendar instances](https://obsidian-full-calendar-remastered.github.io/plugin-full-calendar/architecture/calendars/architecture/) and sources were not updating correctly during initialization.
ast.target: 修复了[日历实例](https://obsidian-full-calendar-remastered.github.io/plugin-full-calendar/architecture/calendars/architecture/)和源在初始化期间未正确更新的问题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Added optional `teardown` method for CalendarProvider and ensured proper cleanup before registry reinitialization and shutdown to improve lifecycle stability.
ast.target: 为 CalendarProvider 添加了可选的 `teardown` 方法，并确保在注册表重新初始化和关闭前进行适当清理，以提高生命周期稳定性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Resolved lint issues and improved document handling in `getCalendarColors` and `renderCalendar` for more robust rendering behavior.
ast.target: 解决了 lint 问题，并改进了 `getCalendarColors` 和 `renderCalendar` 中的文档处理，以实现更稳健的渲染行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fixed `clearUpdateQueue` and improved update flush logic in CacheSubscriptionManager, ensuring correct handling of recurring child event deletions and burst update consistency.
ast.target: 修复了 `clearUpdateQueue` 并改进了 CacheSubscriptionManager 中的更新刷新逻辑，确保正确处理循环子事件删除和突发更新一致性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: RECOMMENDED: Introducing [NLP](https://obsidian-full-calendar-remastered.github.io/plugin-full-calendar/user/features/nlp/) for keyboard free orchestration.
ast.target: 推荐：引入 [NLP](https://obsidian-full-calendar-remastered.github.io/plugin-full-calendar/user/features/nlp/) 以实现免键盘编排。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Added Outlook integration with full recurrence support and improved frontmatter/metadata handling. ([#259](https://github.com/obsidian-full-calendar-remastered/plugin-full-calendar/issues/259))
ast.target: 添加了 Outlook 集成，支持完整的重复功能，并改进了 frontmatter/元数据处理。 ([#259](https://github.com/obsidian-full-calendar-remastered/plugin-full-calendar/issues/259))

ast.name: description
ast.source: Added Chinese (zh) localization and restructured the documentation suite for better navigation. ([#246](https://github.com/obsidian-full-calendar-remastered/plugin-full-calendar/issues/246))
ast.target: 添加了中文 (zh) 本地化，并重构了文档套件以改善导航。 ([#246](https://github.com/obsidian-full-calendar-remastered/plugin-full-calendar/issues/246))

ast.name: description
ast.source: Added Day Planner format support, 24h time prefix serialization, deduplication for mirrored tasks, and fuzzy search in the tasks backlog.
ast.target: 添加了 Day Planner 格式支持、24 小时时间前缀序列化、镜像任务去重以及待办事项中的模糊搜索。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hardened mobile CalDAV authentication, improved import UX diagnostics, and resolved DailyNote UID collisions on move. Converting all-day to timed events now defaults to 1-hour duration.
ast.target: 加强了移动设备 CalDAV 认证，改进了导入用户体验诊断，并解决了移动时每日笔记 UID 冲突问题。将全天事件转换为定时事件现在默认为 1 小时持续时间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Added a dedicated ActivityWatch sync engine with continuity-aware ingestion, auto-sync scheduling, and title templating.
ast.target: 添加了专用的 ActivityWatch 同步引擎，具有连续性感知摄取、自动同步调度和标题模板功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Switched sync handling to keyed identity diffs with reverse lookup maps and safer continuity replacement to reduce churn and duplicate blocks.
ast.target: 将同步处理切换为基于键的身份差异与反向查找映射，以及更安全的连续性替换，以减少流失和重复块。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Updated settings navigation, calendar interactions, search behavior, and mobile responsiveness.
ast.target: 更新了设置导航、日历交互、搜索行为和移动设备响应能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reduced startup and bundle overhead, refreshed locale loading, and added ActivityWatch architecture documentation.
ast.target: 减少了启动和捆绑包开销，刷新了区域设置加载，并添加了 ActivityWatch 架构文档。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open or focus the main calendar view.
ast.target: 打开或聚焦主日历视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open or focus the calendar sidebar view.
ast.target: 打开或聚焦日历侧边栏视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Switch between day, week, month, and timeline views.
ast.target: 在日、周、月和时间线视图之间切换。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 打开创建/编辑事件模态框。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read cached events and event details.
ast.target: 读取缓存的事件和事件详情。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create, update, move, and delete events.
ast.target: 创建、更新、移动和删除事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List calendar sources and provider capabilities.
ast.target: 列出日历源和提供程序功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trigger provider refresh or remote revalidation.
ast.target: 触发提供程序刷新或远程重新验证。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 更新并持久化插件设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unrestricted access to internal state and APIs.
ast.target: 对内部状态和 API 的无限制访问。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the default hover label font used by all traces on the graph.
ast.target: 设置图表中所有轨迹使用的默认悬停标签字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the background color of the hover labels for this trace
ast.target: 设置此轨迹悬停标签的背景颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the border color of the hover labels for this trace.
ast.target: 设置此轨迹悬停标签的边框颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the font used in hover labels.
ast.target: 设置悬停标签中使用的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the width (in px or fraction) of the legend for this trace.
ast.target: 设置此轨迹图例的宽度（以像素或分数表示）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the opacity of the trace.

ast.name: description
ast.target: 启用编辑坐标轴标题文本。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 启用编辑颜色条标题文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables editing the trace name fields from the legend
ast.target: 启用从图例编辑轨迹名称字段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables editing the global layout title.
ast.target: 启用编辑全局布局标题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines whether or not notifier is displayed.

ast.name: description
ast.source: watermark the images with the company's logo
ast.target: 使用公司徽标为图像添加水印。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the length of the undo/redo queue.
ast.target: 设置撤销/重做队列的长度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The easing function used for the transition

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the width (in px or fraction) of the legend for new shape.
ast.target: 设置新形状图例的宽度（以像素或分数表示）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 设置线宽（以像素为单位）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the opacity of new shapes.
ast.target: 设置新形状的不透明度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the new shape label text font.
ast.target: 设置新形状标签文本的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets padding (in px) between edge of label and edge of new shape.
ast.target: 设置标签边缘与新形状边缘之间的内边距（以像素为单位）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the color filling the active shape' interior.
ast.target: 设置填充活动形状内部的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the opacity of the active shape.
ast.target: 设置活动形状的不透明度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the color filling the active selection' interior.
ast.target: 设置填充活动选区内部的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the opacity of the active selection.
ast.target: 设置活动选区的不透明度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The amount of padding (in px) along the top of the component.
ast.target: 组件顶部的内边距量（以像素为单位）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The amount of padding (in px) on the right side of the component.
ast.target: 组件右侧的内边距量（以像素为单位）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The amount of padding (in px) along the bottom of the component.
ast.target: 组件底部的内边距量（以像素为单位）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The amount of padding (in px) on the left side of the component.
ast.target: 组件左侧的内边距量（以像素为单位）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Minimum width of the plot with margin.automargin applied (in px)
ast.target: 应用 margin.automargin 后图表的最小宽度（以像素为单位）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Minimum height of the plot with margin.automargin applied (in px)
ast.target: 应用 margin.automargin 后图表的最小高度（以像素为单位）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 设置左边距（以像素为单位）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 设置右边距（以像素为单位）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the background color of the paper where the graph is drawn.
ast.target: 设置绘制图形的纸张背景颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A label by which to identify the frame

ast.name: description
ast.target: 设置刻度线长度（单位：像素）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 设置刻度线宽度（单位：像素）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the color of the grid lines.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the width (in px) of the grid lines.
ast.target: 设置网格线的宽度（单位：像素）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the title of this axis.

ast.name: description
ast.target: 设置此坐标轴的标题字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines whether or not the tick labels are drawn.
ast.target: 确定是否绘制刻度标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the spike color. If undefined, will use the series color
ast.target: 设置指示线的颜色。如果未定义，将使用系列颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the width (in px) of the zero line.
ast.target: 设置零线的宽度（单位：像素）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines whether spikelines are stuck to the cursor or to the closest datapoints.
ast.target: 确定指示线是附着在光标上还是附着在最近的数据点上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Same as `showtickprefix` but for tick suffixes.

ast.name: message
ast.source: You have unsaved changes. Would you like to save them before closing?
ast.target: 您有未保存的更改。是否要在关闭前保存？

ast.name: message
ast.source: FCR Reminder is not running. Please start the companion app to enable native, offline notifications.
ast.target: FCR Reminder 未运行。请启动配套应用以启用原生离线通知。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Do you like what you see?
ast.target: 您喜欢所看到的内容吗？

ast.name: message
ast.source: A recurring event cannot be both weekly (daysOfWeek) and monthly/yearly (dayOfMonth).
ast.target: 重复事件不能同时是每周（daysOfWeek）和每月/每年（dayOfMonth）。

ast.name: message
ast.source: A recurring event must define a recurrence rule (either daysOfWeek, dayOfMonth, or repeatOn).
ast.target: 重复事件必须定义重复规则（daysOfWeek、dayOfMonth 或 repeatOn）。

ast.name: message
ast.source: A yearly recurring event (with month) must also have a dayOfMonth.
ast.target: 每年重复事件（带月份）还必须有 dayOfMonth。

ast.name: message
ast.source: A monthly recurring event can repeat on a specific day of the month OR on a numbered weekday, but not both.
ast.target: 每月重复事件可以在每月的特定日期重复，也可以在特定编号的星期几重复，但不能同时使用两者。
